helpful: Provisioned petition and extracted questions presented
CourtListener opinion text for checking the petition's central authorities
gaps: The separate lower-court appendix and opinions were not provisioned as searchable text
Corpus query lacked filters for pro se status, response waiver, unpublished posture, and legal issue
notes: The corpus query transferred a large amount of data but returned generic recent SCOTUS dispositions, so the statpack and targeted MCP opinion retrieval were more useful.
